tasks.subject: Task 1: DB migration + schema types for box sampling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `sampled_at` and `sampled_by_id` columns to `erp_receiving_boxes` and update the Drizzle schema.

**Files:**
- Create: `migrations/0040_receiving_boxes_sampling.sql`
- Modify: `shared/schema.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Migration SQL adds `sampled_at TIMESTAMPTZ` and `sampled_by_id UUID REFERENCES erp_users(id)` to `erp_receiving_boxes`
- [ ] `receivingBoxes` pgTable includes `sampledAt` and `sampledById` fields
- [ ] `ReceivingBoxWithSampler` type exported from `shared/schema.ts`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` â†’ 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations/0040_receiving_boxes_sampling.sql", "shared/schema.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration adds sampled_at and sampled_by_id columns", "receivingBoxes pgTable has sampledAt and sampledById", "ReceivingBoxWithSampler type exported", "pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Storage layer â€” sampleBox(), getBoxByLabel(), updated getReceivingBoxes()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement three storage methods powering the scan endpoints.

**Files:**
- Modify: `server/db-storage.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `sampleBox(boxId, userId)` marks box sampled + auto-advances QUARANTINEDâ†’SAMPLING and SAMPLINGâ†’PENDING_QC in one transaction
- [ ] handles sampleSize=1 edge case
- [ ] throws 404 if box not found, 409 if already sampled
- [ ] `getBoxByLabel(label)` returns `{ box, receivingRecord }` or undefined
- [ ] `getReceivingBoxes()` returns `ReceivingBoxWithSampler[]` with sampler name joined
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` â†’ 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/db-storage.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sampleBox marks box and auto-advances status", "getBoxByLabel returns box + record", "getReceivingBoxes joins sampler name"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: API routes â€” PATCH sample + GET by-label
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose two endpoints for the scan flows.

**Files:**
- Modify: `server/routes.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `PATCH /api/receiving/boxes/:id/sample` requires auth + WAREHOUSE/LAB_TECH/QA role
- [ ] `GET /api/receiving/boxes/by-label/:label` requires auth; URL-decodes label
- [ ] Both routes use `next(err)` for error propagation
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` â†’ 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/routes.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PATCH route added with correct auth", "GET route added with URL decode"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: QR code on labels â€” ZPL + HTML preview
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add QR code to ZPL template and HTML preview; remove QUARANTINE text from ZPL.

**Files:**
- Modify: `client/src/lib/zebra-print.ts`
- Modify: `client/src/components/receiving/ReceivingLabelDrawer.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] qrcode package installed
- [ ] `buildZpl()` includes `^BQ` QR code encoding `box.boxLabel`
- [ ] `buildZpl()` no longer contains QUARANTINE text
- [ ] HTML preview shows QR image for first box
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` â†’ 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/lib/zebra-print.ts", "client/src/components/receiving/ReceivingLabelDrawer.tsx", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["^BQ in ZPL", "QUARANTINE text removed", "QR image in preview"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: BoxScanner component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build BoxScanner Sheet with BarcodeDetector camera + text-input fallback.

**Files:**
- Create: `client/src/components/receiving/BoxScanner.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Uses BarcodeDetector with camera when available
- [ ] Falls back to text input if unsupported or camera denied
- [ ] Calls `onScan(label)` on detection
- [ ] Shows `error` prop
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` â†’ 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/components/receiving/BoxScanner.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BarcodeDetector camera scan", "text fallback", "onScan called", "error shown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wire scan buttons + box list into ReceivingDetail
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Mark Box Sampled + Scan Box buttons, box list, scan flows to ReceivingDetail.

**Files:**
- Modify: `client/src/pages/receiving.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ReceivingDetail has `onNavigateTo` prop
- [ ] Box list with sampled state
- [ ] Mark Box Sampled: QUARANTINED/SAMPLING, WAREHOUSE/LAB_TECH/QA
- [ ] Scan Box: PENDING_QC, QA only
- [ ] Lab + QC scan flows with all error cases
- [ ] PO font sizes fixed
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` â†’ 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/receiving.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onNavigateTo prop", "box list", "scan buttons with role checks", "all scan flows", "PO font sizes"]}
```
